questions.q: Researchers recently developed a new analytical method and discovered that small fish living downstream of urban wastewater treatment plants are actively accumulating what substances?
options: Antidepressants, opioids, and other drugs of abuse
High levels of microplastics from clothing
questions.correctText: Antidepressants, opioids, and other drugs of abuse

questions.q: In mid-April 2026, the International Monetary Fund (IMF) reported that which nation currently holds the strongest fiscal position among the G7 countries?
Reversing a prior decision, Iran announced on April 18, 2026, that it would reimpose restrictions on which critical waterway, accusing the US of violating a deal to reopen it?
An April 17, 2026 WIRED investigation detailed how which famously vengeful team owner uses an extensive surveillance operation at Madison Square Garden to track protesters, lawyers, and critics?
On April 17, 2026, the FAA rescinded a 3,000-foot no-fly restriction that had previously threatened civil and criminal penalties for flying drones near the mobile assets of which government agency?
The Justice Department recently removed the lead prosecutor from an ongoing investigation into which prominent Trump critic and former CIA director?
In April 2026, the Africa CDC reported an outbreak of a mysterious, unidentified illness that has killed at least 5 people in which landlocked country?
On April 18, 2026, a massive fire was triggered by a drone strike at an oil refinery located in which region of Russia?
According to an April 18, 2026 report, Meta is planning to lay off approximately what percentage of its global workforce in May?
An April 2026 update confirmed that Amazon's newest Fire Sticks will block users from sideloading outside apps, a change driven by the transition to which proprietary operating system?
